purpose: Map chart, lab, medication, order, and attachment artifacts to criteria with source spans.

contract.groundingRule: Every clinical assertion must include evidence refs, policy citation/source span, or human approval requirement.

toolMappings.name: document_extractor_or_ixp
toolMappings.futureBinding: IXP/Document Understanding lane or fallback parser.

safetyRules: No real patient, payer, provider, credential, or PHI text.
Do not create live UiPath tasks, Data Service records, or agent debug runs without explicit approval.
Submission must be blocked when blocking safety-lab evidence is missing.

validation.jsonValidationCommand: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of process.argv.slice(1)) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'))" uipath/agents/evidence-retrieval/implementation-packet.json uipath/agents/evidence-retrieval/samples/*.json

integrationNotes: Shared runtime lane should pass fixture/schema-compatible objects into the standalone agent inputs or wrap these agents inline in the Maestro policy_evidence stage.
Agent outputs intentionally include audit_event_draft and agent_trace_draft so UiPath workflows remain the live writers of case state.
Tool mappings are documented for Agent Builder configuration; this lane did not bind external process tools because live/runtime resource discovery and uploads are out of scope.
